Evaluation Plan + Key Questions to answer: 1. **What does the company do?** 1. 1. **Do we (DeVC/Z47) have a thesis on this space?** 1. 1. **What are the top 3 questions to diligence?** 1. 1. **Who has piped this company to us? What are their views?** 1. 1. **What do refs say about the founder?** 1. 1. **What's the DeVC team views?** 1. 1. **What are the Collective signals?** 1. 1. **Why is this company likely to be special?** 1. 1. **Who can help? Experts / Venture Partners?** 1. 1. **Deal dynamics? Potential deal to do?** 1. ---

Notes:: **Views:** Yashi: Track for us, should pursue via DeVC **Spiky: **0 **EF/FF: **FF **Founder Archetype: **6 **FMF: **7 **Thesis: **5 + Interesting and very pedigreed team, Dhruv didn’t speak much so don’t have a read on him, Mohak is articulate + For a new startup 12 months out, very good logos and early pilots – great pipeline so far + seemed very high on hunger and hustle ? unclear on their tech moat and thesis area – highly competitive with AI picking up ? Selling to discoms and cracking govt contracts isn’t easy – will need a sales team and ecosystem connects **Notes:** **Product Development** - Thesis was 3 use cases: - Trust deficit: won’t give data, show immediate value via weather which is readily available - RE forecasting - Load forecasting: needs historical load data - Congestion mgmt: both and network nodes - Magic happens when you start doing scheduling and dispatch for utility - Generator etc - 5-10M+ ACV potential - Structured use cases sequentially with increasing data requirements: - Renewable forecasting (limited data needed) - Load forecasting (requires historical load data) - Congestion management (needs both plus network topology) - Goal: Address trust deficit, gain trust, then provide more value - High-value opportunity in scheduling and dispatch decisions ($5-10M+ ACV) **Traction and Customer Pipeline** - Tata Power - Already using software - can add on as a layer - What is landing? Sales motion? Pilot and POC: what are they looking at? - Output ...

Meeting with [Vupil Vaibhav](https://in.linkedin.com/in/vipulvaibhaw) (Founding Engineer @ Pre6 Ai) 2025-07-13T13:54:00.000+05:30: Reflections - Extremely thoughtful / outside-in / product first developer | Seems like Amod has built an A* team around him! ++ Wants to start up someday, doesn’t know what to do ++ Writes developer focused content (including video) Notes 1. About Vipul 1. Early life 1. From Patna 1. Spent 10 yrs in Pune 1. Worked at shitty services companies before taking a 1 year sabbatical 1. Content 1. Started doing a podcast to speak with founders of new age DB companies 1. Amod was an Angel in Tiger DB whose CoFo came on Vipul’s pod 1. Amod connected with Vipul via the same 1. Software Engineering 1. Interested in the hardware side of the world 1. Believes that too many abstractions have caused modern software engineers to not understand hardware 1. Next layer of compute performance improvements will come from hardware utilization 1. About Amod 1. Vipul asked him: “How do I know I’m not joining a rich person’s side project?” 1. Amod said: “you’ll see me in office everyday” 1. And, Amod has been coming to office everyday 1. has STOPPED posting on X and other social platforms 1. About Pre6 1. Thesis: as CPU cost is going up, more companies will switch from cloud to on-prem AND more software engineers will start to care about hardware / architecture choice of hardware while running software 1. Team has been hired from Amod’s network 1. Total 10 people including...

Notes:: **Founders** [**Sandeep Aggarwal**](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sandeep-aggarwal-1a827415/)[** **](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sandeep-aggarwal-1a827415/)- Head Banking and Partnership Alliances @ PayU (~4 yrs), Head Sales and Portfolio - Merchant Acq Biz @ IndusInd (2.5 yrs) , Head ECom and Key Accounts North and East @ Axis Bank (9.5 yrs), Manager Key Accounts @ HDFC Bank (1 yr) [**Arvind Singh**](https://www.linkedin.com/in/arvind-singh-a324341a/) - Business Head Commercial and Business Cards @ IndusInd (~9 yrs 8 mos), TMCs and Alliances @ Axis Bank (6 yrs),  Business Manager Corporate Cards @ ICICI (2 yrs) **Overview- ** Solving B2B payment workflows and  working capital lines using commercial cards. Planning to start by focusing on the travel segment as a vertical, allow smaller OTAs and travel agents to access credit while booking flights (will tie up with IATA over here). **Views** **TT- Weak Maybe** **Overall- **Interesting thesis vis-a-vis B2B payments and vertical focused workflow solving (travel), However founder archetype (Sales profile + muddled thought process ) + lack of courage of conviction( neither of the founders have quit yet) breaks it for me in the first meeting. Will need consistent rockstar refs to consider for MPI Seed. + Interesting thesis- B2B payments + verticalized value using commercial cards --- starting with travel + Founders have spent 10 K hours in the space (albeit in sales roles) ?Muddled thought process- not completely clear on the...

Ashwin's Internal Notes - PASS (FYI since EF) - 2026-02-27: Pass for me. CTO who's surrounded himself with two other technical cofounders and unproven on GTM. Refs middling. POSITIVES: - EF backed, sold a company, CTO @ Simpl - Strong technical mind - Thoughtful and pragmatic - Workspot scaled to $20M but flatlined after - Puneet mostly looked after tech, limited business focus - Well networked in US, some good angel investments CONCERNS: - Thesis: AI to improve engineering documentation (maintain docs across codebase, enable agents to understand via context). Winner-take-all play with Entire.io and other strong competitors already. Wouldn't bet on this team to take them on. - Customer backward-ness low - has strong opinions, will build good initial product but might stay blind to customer feedback on iterating it - GTM muscle missing - his cofounders are two principal engineers. Should have hired complementary skills. - Refs okayish --- REFERENCE 1: Ashwini, VP @ Simpl (reported to him) POSITIVES: - Strong at hustling and getting things done (sets up war rooms, pushes integrations through) - Good problem solver in execution-heavy situations - Very effective networker; uses personal network (Flipkart, Swiggy, etc.) to unlock deals and integrations - Can evolve/learn new areas (picked up GTM basics over ~8 months, went on pitches like Payne 3 to Myntra) - Defends his team well and is an acceptable stakeholder manager - Handles peer-level, technical/business counterparts well (...

Analysis by dev - 2026-01-06: ### Company Snapshot Problem & solution AI agents generate hundreds of unmanaged local Python runtimes on developers’ laptops outside Git, CI, and cloud security tools, creating an endpoint visibility gap in regulated enterprises. PyEnvManager secures these shadow runtimes with instant SBOMs, fleet-wide vulns search in about 2 seconds, and enterprise-grade runtime visibility across endpoints. Ideal customer profile and pricing Target: AI-heavy teams, security-forward enterprises, and regulated industries; bottom-up adoption driving authoritative runtime telemetry. Market signals indicate broad enterprise footprint with multi‑endpoint Python environments; pricing modeled per developer and per enterprise tier (CORE per-developer; PREMIUM Enterprise with governance features). Unit economics cited: 98% gross margin due to client-side processing and a DB-less architecture. Status of product & traction highlight Early beta with tangible usage: 48 organic users across 7+ countries; 2 paid customers. Product emphasizes fleet visibility, SBOMs, rapid global searches, air-gap native deployment, and one-interface management for Python environments. (1) Founders and Key Team Name – Title Siddarth Pai – Co-founder Simhadri Govindappa – Co-founder One-line career summaries; track records Siddarth: previously at JPMC, Walmart, and GE Healthcare. Simhadri: security at scale at AWS (AppSec Guardian) and Uber (SSE); Apache Hive committer. Functional responsibility...

Company Snapshot: Problem & solution Qila Games pursues a social-first hybrid-casual model aimed at delivering premium games with high LTVs in India, MENA, and LATAM. Hybrid-casual combines simple mechanics with the monetisation depth of mid-core IAP-heavy games, targeting the region’s rising willingness to pay and microtransactions. First IP Ludo Hero is positioned to hybrid-casualise a globally familiar mechanic (Ludo) to drive retention and monetisation at scale. Ideal customer profile and pricing Target markets: India, MENA, LATAM. Pricing: IAP-heavy monetisation; exact pricing model not disclosed. Status of product & traction highlight Ludo Hero live on Android and iOS; game trailer available; early traction indicates strong retention and engagement; on track to reach $7M ARR by 2027.
(2) Product and Technology: Product stage Live on Android and iOS (Ludo Hero). Core functionality & tech stack Not disclosed. Unique IP Not disclosed beyond leveraging a globally familiar IP (Ludo) for hybrid-casualisation. Key differentiators vs substitutes Hybrid-casual approach combines familiar mechanics with live-ops, progression, and meta-economies to improve retention and monetisation over ad-heavy, single-session titles. Implementation complexity / switching costs Not disclosed.
(5) Business Model and GTM: Pricing model IAP-heavy monetisation. Distribution channels & partnerships Not disclosed. Sales cycle length & decision maker Not disclosed. Customer retention strategy Live-ops, ...

Deck insights from Notion AI on 2025-04-30T18:01:00.000+05:30: Based on the investor deck attachment, [Qodex.ai](http://qodex.ai/) is an AI-powered API testing and documentation platform. Here are the key points: - **Product:** AI-powered platform for software testing with vertical AI agents, aiming to reduce testing time by half by 2025 and costs by one-third - **Traction:** Currently serving 2 enterprise and 12+ mid-market companies, with 50+ active projects - **Team:** - Siddhant Mohan (CEO): 3x founder, [ex-Builder.ai](http://ex-builder.ai/) Head of Engineering - Shreya Srivastava (COO): 3x founder with startup experience - Strong technical team with members from AWS, eBay, and other tech companies - **Market Opportunity:** $16B annual market size, targeting the $30B automation testing market that's growing at 18% - **Vision:** Aims to become the customizable AI Assistant for Developers by 2030 ---
Qodex AIBackground & Experience: - Founded Review Maniacs in college - review aggregation platform for online shopping - Joined [Builder.ai](http://builder.ai/) as founding engineer, rose to CTO/CPO through Series B - Led team of ~150 tech/product people across India, US - Built Builder Cloud - infrastructure optimization product - Achieved significant enterprise customer adoption (Flipkart, Myntra)
Notes:: Overall: WMB for Z47 given FF. Would rate him on 0.5 spiky for tech. US GTM is a clear gap and he hits the $1M target with US MM and enterprise cos then this is interesting ...
